areas.label: UI
areas.description: Author controller-first 2D documents, images, text, inputs, buttons, and HUD values.

areas.label: Music
areas.description: Organize and validate songs, tracker modules, streamed tracks, and music budgets.

areas.label: SFX
areas.description: Organize and validate sound effects, voices, sample rates, compression, and playback assets.

areas.label: 3D Environment
areas.description: Curate world models, textures, and collision-ready environment assets.

areas.label: 3D Avatars
areas.description: Curate character models, rigs, animations, materials, and avatar budgets.

areas.label: Cutscenes
areas.description: Coordinate visual-script sequences with UI, music, SFX, cameras, and scene transitions.
